name: Lentil Soup
embedding_text: Lentil Soup is a appetizers dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $9.95. Lentil, wheat flour, onions, potatoes, red chili sauce, and tomato sauce, combined in a veggie broth base and sprinkled with mint. It is vegetarian.

name: Cold Skin Noodle
embedding_text: Cold Skin Noodle is a appetizers dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $9.95. Made from Wheat Flour, Cucumber, Cilantro, Bean Sprouts, and Gluten with Spicy Sauce. It is vegetarian. It is spicy.

name: Chuchura
embedding_text: Chuchura is a appetizers dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $10.95. Mini-dumpling soup with minced beef, lamb, and onions, seasoned with black pepper.

embedding_text: Sigara Boregi is a appetizers dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $9.95. Crispy rolls with herby cheese filling and parsley. It is vegetarian.

embedding_text: Cold Egg Noodle is a appetizers dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $9.95. Made from Flour and Egg with Spicy Sesame, Peanut, Sesame Sauce, and Chili Oil. It is vegetarian. It is spicy.

name: Samsa
embedding_text: Samsa is a appetizers dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $4.95. Oven-baked buns with minced beef, lamb and onions seasoned with black pepper, red pepper and sprinkled with sesame oil. Note: One Per Order.

name: Kawa Samsa
embedding_text: Kawa Samsa is a appetizers dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $4.95. Butternut squash, onions, red and green bell peppers, black pepper, and house spices stuffed yolk and sesame sprinkled oven-baked buns. It is vegetarian. Note: One Per Order.

embedding_text: Chicken Burger is a appetizers dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $10.95. The Bun is filled with Chicken, Onion, and Peppers. It is spicy.

embedding_text: Beef Burger is a appetizers dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $10.95. The Bun is filled with Beef, Onion, and Peppers. It is spicy.

name: Dolma
embedding_text: Dolma is a appetizers dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $9.95. Traditional Turkish dish that consists of stuffed vegetables, like bell peppers, aubergine, and white wrapped with grape leaves. It is vegetarian.

name: Dolan Laghman
embedding_text: Dolan Laghman is a rice & noodles dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $19.95. Sauteed beef and various combinations of vegetables, beef, and mushroom oyster-flavored sauce topped with hand-pulled chewy noodles.

name: Royal Laghman
embedding_text: Royal Laghman is a rice & noodles dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $19.95. Beef, stir-fried onions, cabbage, mushrooms, green and red peppers, mushroom oyster-flavored sauce, and tomato topped hand-pulled chewy noodles. Available as: Vegetarian ($19.95), With Beef ($19.95), With Chicken ($19.95), With Shrimp ($23.95).

name: Korma Chop
embedding_text: Korma Chop is a rice & noodles dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $19.95. Uyghur-styled signature fried noodles with chives, onions, red bell peppers, and beef or chicken or shrimp. Vegetarian version also available. Available as: Vegetarian ($19.95), With Beef ($19.95), With Chicken ($19.95), With Shrimp ($23.95).

name: Pearled Noodles
embedding_text: Pearled Noodles is a rice & noodles dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $19.95. Stir-fried pearled noodles with finely cut beef and veggies. Vegetarian version also available.

name: Fried Rice
embedding_text: Fried Rice is a rice & noodles dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $18.95. White Rice fried with Chicken, salt, sugar, Onion, red and green peppers. Available as: Vegetarian ($18.95), With Chicken ($18.95), With Beef ($18.95), With Shrimp ($22.95).

name: Signature Rice Noodle
embedding_text: Signature Rice Noodle is a rice & noodles dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $19.95. Rice noodles prepared with a stir-fry combination of chicken, onions, celery, chili peppers, spicy bean paste, oyster-flavored sauce and house spices. It is spicy. Available as: With Chicken ($19.95), With Beef ($19.95), With Shrimp ($23.95).

name: Rock Pot Soup
embedding_text: Rock Pot Soup is a rice & noodles dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $20.95. Hot pot style soup available with beef or seafood. With Beef: house-made Meatball, Enoki Mushroom, Bok Choy, Tofu, Mung Bean Vermicelli, Cilantro, Scallion and Chili Oil. With Seafood: Shrimp, Fish-Tofu, Enoki Mushroom, Bok Choy, Tofu, Mung Bean Vermicelli, Cilantro, Scallion and Chili Oil. It is spicy. Available as: With Beef and Meatball ($20.95), With Seafood ($23.95).

embedding_text: Hand Pulled Noodles is a rice & noodles dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $7.50. Chewy plain hand-pulled noodles. It is vegetarian.

name: Spicy Tofu

name: Big Plate Chicken
notes: Preparation time up to 25 minutes. Extra noodle $7.50
embedding_text: Big Plate Chicken is a chef's specialties dish at Dolan Uyghur Restaurant in Rockville, MD, priced at $59.95. Note: Preparation time up to 25 minutes. Extra noodle $7.50.
